interaction_history.content: what should I be focusing on when I read

content.main_response: Welcome! I’m so glad you’re interested in improving your academic reading skills. Reading with purpose can really enhance your understanding and insights. Could you share what strategies you currently use when you read for research?

transparency.explanation: The response was generated to engage the user and encourage reflection on their current reading strategies, fostering a productive dialogue about academic reading skills.
transparency.what_to_verify: Whether engaging users in dialogue is an effective strategy for helping them improve their academic reading skills.
